labels.name: domain:blog
labels.description: PR touches blog posts or customer stories

labels.name: domain:infra
labels.description: PR touches workflows, scripts, infra, Makefile, or build config

labels.name: domain:website
labels.description: PR touches marketing, pricing, legal, or competitive landing pages

labels.name: domain:mixed
labels.description: PR touches more than one domain

labels.name: review:trivial
labels.description: Tiny prose-only change; skips Claude review

labels.name: review:frontmatter-only
labels.description: Frontmatter-only PR (any size); skips Claude review like review:trivial does

labels.name: review:prose-flagged
labels.description: Trivial or frontmatter-only PR where triage's prose-check found possible spelling/grammar issues

labels.name: review:claude-ran
labels.description: Claude review has completed for this PR's current state

labels.name: review:claude-stale
labels.description: New commits since last Claude review; refresh on next ready-transition or @claude mention

labels.name: needs-author-response
labels.description: Review surfaced unverifiable claims; author owes a response
